summary: Rebrand + full regression VERIFIED on web preview. (A) REBRAND: app.json has name='Barbershop Francesco Moretti' and slug='barbershop-francesco-moretti'; all 6 PNG assets exist with correct dimensions and content — logo-white.png (2845x1599 RGBA), icon.png/adaptive-icon.png/splash-image.png/app-image.png (1024x1024, black bg (~#0C0C0C) with centered white logo occupying rows 305-718 x cols 143-879, ~76k white px avg brightness 239.5), favicon.png (256x256 with centered logo). Landing screen renders white logo on black background with all 3 buttons visible ('Accedi', 'Crea account', 'Sfoglia i servizi senza account →') — screenshot confirms Francesco Moretti BARBER SHOP script+serif+mustache+razors logo. Customer home renders same logo in header (top-left) with share button (top-right, testID=home-share-btn), black hero (no old hero image), 'Prenota il tuo look' title, and the old 'Barber Shop Francesco Moretti' text is gone. Browser tab title = 'Barbershop Francesco Moretti'. (B) REGRESSION: 21/21 pytest tests PASSED (auth, /api/auth/me, services CRUD, availability with +02:00 Europe/Rome slots, bookings create/conflict/mine, admin bookings/clients, waitlist join+auto-notify, blacklist, payment intent). /api/schedule (public) → 200 with weekly hours. /api/register-push endpoint exists (422 validation when body incomplete, confirming routing). Admin login → /admin/diary works. Date picker button opens modal showing 'Luglio 2026' calendar with 60-day chip scroll and Italian day chips (Mer 1, Gio 2, ...). Schedule tab shows Italian day names Lunedì-Domenica in Monday-first order with real hours 09:00-12:30 · 14:00-19:30. Services tab shows real services (Taglio Uomo €15, Combo €20, Sfumatura €12, Rasatura €5, Shampoo). Profile tab shows dynamic weekly hours (09:00/19:30) — no hardcoded '9-19'. Notification bell with badge '3' visible in admin diary header. 12 service cards render on customer home. Zero page errors. Only warnings observed: benign expo-notifications web-listener warning and RN-web props.pointerEvents deprecation (non-blocking).
critical_code_review_comments: index.tsx and (customer)/home.tsx still import 'LinearGradient' but no longer render it after the rebrand — safe to remove unused import (non-blocking).
index.tsx still declares 'const HERO = ...' unused after rebrand — safe to remove (non-blocking).
(customer)/home.tsx also still declares unused HERO constant and unused tagline/brandName styles — safe to remove (non-blocking).

Rebrand assets (icon/adaptive-icon/splash-image/app-image) are all identical 1024x1024 files (same 125264-byte size); acceptable for a first pass but consider platform-specific safe zones for Android adaptive-icon (foregroundImage should fit inside a 66% radius circle) — current logo bbox is ~740x413 in a 1024 square so ~28% margin; the adaptive icon is fine.
server.py still 692 lines — consider modularizing (carry-over from iter 1&2, non-blocking).
seed_data_creation: None. Reused TEST_ users/services from prior iterations. No production data touched.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rebrand to 'Barbershop Francesco Moretti' with white-on-black Francesco Moretti BARBER SHOP logo is complete and rendering correctly on landing + customer home. All backend endpoints and admin/customer flows previously verified in iteration_2 still pass. Backend tests: 21/21. No open bugs. Minor cleanup suggestions (unused HERO const, unused LinearGradient import, unused tagline/brandName styles) are non-blocking.
